Grad Cafe Analytics
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference

Flask Application and Routes

Flask application for the Grad Cafe analysis page.

src.app.create_app(config=None, *, scraper=None, loader=None)

Configure and return the Flask application.

Tests may inject a scraper and loader so no live scrape is required.

src.app.get_db_connection()

Connect to PostgreSQL using DATABASE_URL when it is configured.

src.app.index()

Query PostgreSQL and render the original Module 3 analysis page.

src.app.pull_data()

Start a data pull or reject the request while another pull is active.

src.app.run_pull_data()

Run the existing Module 3 pull script in the background.

src.app.update_analysis()

Return success when analysis can be refreshed.

Scraping

src.scrape.check_robots()
src.scrape.clean_data(records)
src.scrape.load_data(filename)
src.scrape.save_data(data, filename)
src.scrape.scrape_data()

Cleaning

Clean raw Grad Cafe records into the Module 3 schema.

src.clean.clean_file(input_file=PosixPath('/Users/ridafatimaalvi/Documents/jhu_software_concepts/module_4/applicant_data.json'), output_file=PosixPath('/Users/ridafatimaalvi/Documents/jhu_software_concepts/module_4/applicant_data_for_llm.json'))

Read raw JSON, clean it, and write cleaned JSON.

src.clean.clean_records(records)

Extract unique structured applicants from raw page text.

src.clean.extract_metric(label, text)

Return the metric following label, or an empty string.

Loading Data

PostgreSQL schema and loading functions for Grad Cafe records.

src.load_data.clean_date(value)

Convert a Grad Cafe date string to a date.

src.load_data.clean_float(value)

Convert a scraped numeric value to float or None.

src.load_data.create_schema(connection)

Create the Module 3 applicants table and uniqueness constraint.

src.load_data.get_connection(database_url=None)

Return a PostgreSQL connection for loading data.

src.load_data.load_json_file(path, connection_factory=<function get_connection>)

Load records from a JSON array file.

src.load_data.load_records(records, connection_factory=<function get_connection>)

Insert records transactionally and ignore duplicate URLs.

src.load_data.normalize_record(record)

Map scraper/Module 3 field names to the required database schema.

Querying Data

PostgreSQL queries used by the Grad Cafe analysis page.

src.query_data.get_analysis(connection_factory=<function get_connection>)

Return the eleven Module 3 analysis answers.

src.query_data.get_connection(database_url=None)

Return a PostgreSQL connection for queries.

src.query_data.query_records(connection_factory=<function get_connection>)

Return applicant rows as dictionaries with Module 3 schema keys.

Pull Coordination

Command-line entry point for scraping and loading Grad Cafe records.

src.pull_data.pull_data(scraper=<function scrape_data>, loader=<function load_records>)

Scrape records and load them into PostgreSQL.
